excluded_sources.description: Primary query used for source discovery only: b2b public content loops clay lovable gitlab.
Existing employee-generated content examples page used only to avoid duplication and set internal-link context.

rules: Discovery inputs can shape research direction, but they cannot support public factual claims.
Use first-party company pages, official docs, public handbooks, and direct public artifacts as evidence.
Do not cite Reddit, forums, query exports, autocomplete, PAA, or AI answers as factual evidence.
